title: Hornet Removal in Mineola, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Mineola, Long Island. Safe, fast hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Mineola homes and businesses. Call now!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets around your Mineola property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services throughout Mineola and surrounding Long Island communities. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate hornet nests and protect your family, pets, and visitors from painful stings.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Long Island residents, Best Pest Control NYC brings specialized expertise in hornet identification and safe nest removal to Mineola homes and businesses. Our licensed technicians arrive fully equipped, work efficiently to minimize disruption, and guarantee complete hornet elimination with transparent pricing from $350-$550.
localContext: Mineola's tree-lined residential streets, historic homes near the Mineola train station, and properties around Memorial Park frequently attract hornets seeking sheltered nesting sites in eaves, attics, and mature trees. The village's mix of classic architecture and established landscaping creates ideal conditions for hornet colonies during warmer months, making professional removal essential for homeowner safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Mineola?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service throughout Mineola. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. The actual removal process typically takes 1-2 hours depending on nest size and location, ensuring your property is hornet-free as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, safe disposal of the nest, and a follow-up guarantee. Pricing depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide a firm quote before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are hornets dangerous to my Mineola property and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets can be very dangerous. Unlike bees, hornets can sting multiple times and often attack aggressively when their nest is threatened. Their stings are painful and can cause severe allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. Hornets nesting near entryways, play areas, or outdoor living spaces pose significant risks that require professional removal.

faqs.question: Do you service all areas of Mineola including near the train station?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We provide comprehensive hornet removal services throughout all of Mineola, including residential neighborhoods, properties near the Mineola LIRR station, commercial areas along Jericho Turnpike, and homes around Memorial Park and Winthrop University Hospital. No location in Mineola is outside our service area.
